_comment: User registry (P11/P12 — multi-tenant). Adding a user = one entry: email + channel + items/day + min_score. EVERYONE shares the one relevance ranking, delivered DAILY; personalization is purely each user's own +/- feedback (signals namespaced per user: sent:<id>, affinity:<id>, fb_*:<id>). No per-user prompt. min_score is the quality gate: only deliver items whose (relevance + that user's affinity) clears the bar, so a user is only contacted when there's something worth it — a quiet day sends nothing. 'email_var' names the env/Actions var holding the address (keeps addresses out of git). The agent maintaining this app is just user 'builder' with a digest channel; its digest, when non-empty, becomes a GitHub issue for the Copilot coding agent. Same machinery as every user — no special path.
